name: conduit-login-auth
description: Conduit login, authentication form, and credential preference changes
context_rules: Credential persistence must be opt-in and default off.
Do not store credentials unless the user explicitly checks the remember option.

patch_strategy.summary: Prepare a Conduit login form patch for opt-in remembered credentials.

patches.reason: Remember account/password behavior belongs in the login form state and successful login flow
changes: Add a default-off remember credentials checkbox
Pre-fill email and password from localStorage only when previously opted in
Persist or clear remembered credentials after successful login

acceptance_template: Remember credentials checkbox is unchecked by default
Credentials are stored only after the user opts in
Credentials are cleared when the user logs in without opting in
conduit_acceptance_checks: Login form contains an opt-in remember credentials control
localStorage writes happen only after successful login
